origin.question: 在史瓦西时空中，静止质量为零的光子在赤道面（$\theta=\pi/2$）内运动。已知史瓦西度规为：$$ds^2=-\left(1-\frac{2M}{r}\right)dt^2+\left(1-\frac{2M}{r}\right)^{-1}dr^2+r^2(d\theta^2+\sin^2\thetad\phi^2)$$利用时空的Killing矢量定义守恒量：能量$E = (1 - 2M/r)\dot{t}$和角动量$L = r^2\dot{\phi}$（其中点号表示对仿射参数$\lambda$的求导）。请利用光子测地线的条件$g_{\mu\nu}\dot{x}^\mu\dot{x}^\nu = 0$，将径向方程写为$\left(\frac{dr}{d\lambda}\right)^2 + V_{\text{eff}}(r) = E^2$的形式。由此得到的有效势$V_{\text{eff}}(r)$ 的正确表达式是什么？
origin.answer: 解答：1. 基础条件与守恒量史瓦西度规在赤道面（$\theta=\pi/2\impliesd\theta=0,\sin\theta=1$）简化为：$$ds^2=-\left(1-\frac{2M}{r}\right)dt^2+\left(1-\frac{2M}{r}\right)^{-1}dr^2+r^2d\phi^2$$由于度规分量不显含$t$和$\phi$，时空存在两个Killing矢量$\xi^\mu = (1,0,0,0)$和$\eta^\mu = (0,0,0,1)$。沿测地线的守恒量定义为：能量：$E \equiv -g_{tt}\dot{t} = \left(1 - \frac{2M}{r}\right)\dot{t}$角动量：$L \equiv g_{\phi\phi}\dot{\phi} = r^2\dot{\phi}$其中点号表示对仿射参数$\lambda$的求导（即$\dot{x}^\mu = \frac{dx^\mu}{d\lambda}$）。由此，我们可以将$\dot{t}$和$\dot{\phi}$表达为径向坐标$r$和守恒量的函数：$$\dot{t}=\frac{E}{1-\frac{2M}{r}}$$$$\dot{\phi}=\frac{L}{r^2}$$2.利用零测地线条件推导对于静止质量为零的光子，其微元弧长$ds^2 = 0$，即满足零测地线条件$g_{\mu\nu}\dot{x}^\mu\dot{x}^\nu = 0$。展开各分量：$$-\left(1-\frac{2M}{r}\right)\dot{t}^2+\left(1-\frac{2M}{r}\right)^{-1}\dot{r}^2+r^2\dot{\phi}^2=0$$将前面得到的$\dot{t}$和$\dot{\phi}$代入上式：$$-\left(1-\frac{2M}{r}\right)\left[\frac{E}{1-\frac{2M}{r}}\right]^2+\left(1-\frac{2M}{r}\right)^{-1}\dot{r}^2+r^2\left(\frac{L}{r^2}\right)^2=0$$化简每一项：$$-\frac{E^2}{1-\frac{2M}{r}}+\left(1-\frac{2M}{r}\right)^{-1}\dot{r}^2+\frac{L^2}{r^2}=0$$为了消去$\dot{r}^2$前面的系数，我们给整组方程同时乘以$\left(1 - \frac{2M}{r}\right)$：$$-E^2+\dot{r}^2+\frac{L^2}{r^2}\left(1-\frac{2M}{r}\right)=0$$3.写成标准形式并确定有效势将方程移项，让$\dot{r}^2$（即$\left(\frac{dr}{d\lambda}\right)^2$）留在左边：$$\left(\frac{dr}{d\lambda}\right)^2+\frac{L^2}{r^2}\left(1-\frac{2M}{r}\right)=E^2$$对比题目给出的标准经典力学形式：$$\left(\frac{dr}{d\lambda}\right)^2+V_{\text{eff}}(r)=E^2$$易得光子的有效势为：$$V_{\text{eff}}(r)=\frac{L^2}{r^2}\left(1-\frac{2M}{r}\right)=\frac{L^2}{r^2}-\frac{2ML^2}{r^3}$$

cached_fact_sheet.kretschmann: \frac{r^{6} r_{s}^{2} \left(r - r_{s}\right) \left(\cos^{2}{\left(\theta \right)} - 2\right) \sin^{2}{\left(\theta \right)} - 4 r^{5} r_{s}^{2} \sin^{2}{\left(\theta \right)} + r^{4} r_{s}^{2} \left(r - r_{s}\right)^{3} \left(\sin^{4}{\left(\theta \right)} + \sin^{2}{\left(\theta \right)}\right) + 4 r^{3} \left(r - r_{s}\right)^{4} \sin^{4}{\left(\theta \right)} + 4 r^{3} \left(r - r_{s}\right)^{4} + r^{2} r_{s}^{2} \left(r - r_{s}\right) \sin^{2}{\left(\theta \right)} + r^{2} r_{s}^{2} \left(r - r_{s}\right) - 4 r r_{s}^{2} \left(r - r_{s}\right)^{4} \sin^{2}{\left(\theta \right)} - r_{s}^{2} \left(r - r_{s}\right)^{3} \sin^{2}{\left(\theta \right)} - r_{s}^{2} \left(r - r_{s}\right)^{3}}{2 r^{9} \left(r - r_{s}\right)^{2} \sin^{2}{\left(\theta \right)}}
